title: rdap-bottom
summary: Link relation type "rdap-bottom": Refers to the set of child RDAP objects that do not themselves have child objects, in a hierarchy of objects. Defined in RFC9910.
source_version: IANA registry, Last-Modified: Mon, 12 Jan 2026 18:11:26 GMT

raw_columns.Description: Refers to the set of child RDAP objects that do not themselves have child objects, in a hierarchy of objects.
